calibration_run.notes: Example showing agreement and unsafe veto handling.

decision_mapping.baseline_better: Baseline is clearer, safer, or more proportionate.
decision_mapping.perceptual_better: Perceptual narrative improves specificity without unsafe overreach.
decision_mapping.mixed: Perceptual narrative helps and harms in the same case.
decision_mapping.unsafe_overreach: Perceptual narrative introduces unsupported interpretation or unsafe inference.

case_identity_rules: Use brand_id as stable case key.
Attach source_case_index from the paired evaluation artifact.
notes_rules: Do not treat notes as official findings.
overreach_tagging_rules: Unsafe decisions must include at least one overreach mode when notes identify one.
If notes identify outcome claims in wellness, tag unsupported_emotional_projection.
If notes identify unsupported authority or trust, tag invented_intentionality.
safe_zone_tagging_rules: Safe augmentation requires majority perceptual_better or mixed without unsafe veto.
Safe augmentation requires medium or high confidence from most reviewers.
draft_handling: No scoring or report output dependency.

agreement_levels.strong_agreement: At least 75% of reviewed votes select the same non-unsafe decision.
agreement_levels.moderate_agreement: More than 50% of reviewed votes select the same non-unsafe decision.
agreement_levels.unsafe_veto: At least one reviewed vote selects unsafe_overreach.

disagreement_patterns.definition: Some reviewers value perceptual specificity while another flags unsafe interpretation.
disagreement_patterns.calibration_action: Keep augmentation blocked for this case until the unsafe claim is rewritten or removed.

disagreement_patterns.definition: Reviewers agree perceptual version feels more Brand3 while remaining bounded.
disagreement_patterns.calibration_action: Mark as candidate safe augmentation zone.

case_confidence_rules: Strong agreement with no unsafe veto can be high confidence.
Mixed cases remain medium or low until notes converge.
aggregate_confidence_rules: Track safe wins separately from unsafe veto cases.
Require repeated safe wins by surface class before deployment claims.
Do not aggregate unreviewed votes into preference trends.
overreach_frequency_rules: unsafe_overreach count divided by reviewed votes gives direct unsafe rate.
Overreach mode frequency is counted per reviewer vote.
A case with any unsafe vote is unsafe_veto=true.
feels_brand3_consistency_rules: High when most reviewers mark perceptual_better or mixed and notes cite evidence-bound specificity.
Medium when preference is split but no unsafe veto exists.
Low when notes cite generic sophistication or unsupported interpretation.

reviewer_votes.notes: Operational density and category-to-surface language are specific and evidence-bound.
The augmented version avoids trust claims and names visible documentation mechanisms.
Good Brand3 voice; keep operational density anchored to navigation and code evidence.

calibration_signals.notes_summary: Reviewers agree perceptual version improves specificity and Brand3 voice without unsafe overreach.

reviewer_votes.notes: Better boundaries than baseline, but support language remains risky.
Wellness support and outcome language need stricter evidence gates.
Perceptual version is more careful than baseline, but not safe without reviewer constraints.

calibration_signals.notes_summary: Reviewers see narrative improvement but flag wellness emotional projection as unsafe.

safe_augmentation_zones: documentation or enterprise surfaces with visible information architecture
cases where perceptual language replaces trust claims with observable mechanisms
unsafe_augmentation_zones: wellness or lifestyle surfaces where emotional support is inferred from tone
cases where reviewer notes flag user outcome claims
aggregate_calibration.calibration_recommendation: Perceptual augmentation is promising for documentation and enterprise surfaces, but wellness/lifestyle should remain blocked without stricter emotional projection controls.
